_generator.name: Hand-authored ARM template — single source of truth. No Bicep, no auto-compile, no drift.

metadata.comments: XdrLogRaider — pure data-pipeline connector. Requires an existing Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace. Adds 47 custom tables + a GenericUI Data Connector card. Operators bring their own KQL.

metadata.description: Project prefix used in resource names. 3-12 lowercase alphanumeric.
Legacy env-in-name pattern; for in-place upgrades from pre-v0.2.0 only.
Region for connector resources (Function App, Key Vault, Storage, Application Insights).
Resource ID of an existing Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace.
Azure region of the existing workspace.
UPN of the read-only service account the connector authenticates as.
Restrict public network access on Storage, Key Vault, and Application Insights.
Send Key Vault audit logs to the workspace.
GitHub repo (owner/name) hosting the Function App release.

variables.stName: [substring(toLower(replace(concat(parameters('projectPrefix'), variables('stEnvSegment'), 'st', variables('suffix')), '-', '')), 0, if(less(length(toLower(replace(concat(parameters('projectPrefix'), variables('stEnvSegment'), 'st', variables('suffix')), '-', ''))), 24), length(toLower(replace(concat(parameters('projectPrefix'), variables('stEnvSegment'), 'st', variables('suffix')), '-', ''))), 24))]

properties.description: Microsoft Sentinel data connector that polls Defender XDR portal-only endpoints and lands telemetry in 47 custom Log Analytics tables. Operators bring their own KQL. Source: https://github.com/akefallonitis/xdrlograider
properties.descriptionHtml:
Microsoft Sentinel data connector that polls Defender XDR portal-only endpoints and lands telemetry in 47 custom Log Analytics tables. Operators bring their own KQL.

Source: github.com/akefallonitis/xdrlograider
properties.author: [variables('solutionAuthor')]

connectorUiConfig.title: XdrLogRaider — Defender XDR portal telemetry
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
Polls Microsoft Defender XDR portal-only endpoints (e.g. Action Center, Custom Detections, Exposure Management, Identity, Device Timeline, Machine Actions) and lands telemetry in 47 custom Log Analytics tables. Operators bring their own KQL parsers, hunting queries, analytic rules, and workbooks.

Authentication: unattended TOTP or software passkey via the service account. Multi-portal forward-compat (Defender today; Entra/Purview/Intune planned).

graphQueries.baseQuery: MDE_Heartbeat_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)

sampleQueries.query: customEvents | where name in ('AuthChain.AADSTSError', 'AuthChain.Completed') | order by timestamp desc | take 10
MDE_Heartbeat_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | where StreamsSucceeded > 0 | order by TimeGenerated desc

sampleQueries.description: Suppression rules modified in the last 24h
sampleQueries.query: MDE_SuppressionRules_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by EntityId | project TimeGenerated, EntityId, RawJson

value: MDE_Heartbeat_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | where StreamsSucceeded > 0 | project IsConnected = isnotempty(TimeGenerated)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions on the workspace are required

customs.name: Service account
customs.description: Dedicated read-only Entra service account (Security Reader + MDE Analyst) with Credentials+TOTP or Software Passkey configured.

instructionSteps.title: Upload auth secrets to Key Vault
instructionSteps.description: Either provide them via the deploy wizard (Authentication step → Upload via wizard) **or** run the helper script after deploy:

instructionSteps.title: Confirm connector liveness
instructionSteps.description: Within 5-10 minutes the Function App's heartbeat timer + first poll fire. The connector card reads MDE_Heartbeat_CL for the IsConnected indicator. For auth chain diagnostics, query App Insights customEvents:

parameters.label: customEvents | where name in ('AuthChain.AADSTSError', 'AuthChain.Completed') | order by timestamp desc | take 10
